UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF FELITA SAMPLE'S MOTION TO VACATE HEARING TO DECLARE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. DEFENDANTS' MOTION IS DENIED AS TO SECURITY IN THE PENDING ACTION. DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PROVIDE ANY LEGAL AUTHORITY OR COMPETENT EVIDENCE REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S REASONABLE PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. SEE MOTION 9:22-28. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Declare Pltf A Vexatious Litigant For A Prefiling Order
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew J. Kozlow (510-832-7770) of Ericksen Arbuthnot for Community Housing Partnership, Akiko White and Barbara Leahy, defendants and moving parties; Plaintiff is not present

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP and AKIKO WHITE'S Motion to Declare Plaintiff a Vexatious Litigant for a Prefiling Order is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendants' motion to declare plaintiff a vexatious litigant is granted and Plaintiff shall be subject to pre-filing order condition pursuant to CCP 391.7(a). Defendants' Motion is denied as to security in the pending action. Defendants failed to provide any legal authority or competent evidence regarding Plaintiff's reasonable probability of prevailing on the merits. See Motion 9:22-28. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

Plaintiff Felita Sample'S Motion To Vacate Hearing To Declare A Vexatious Litigant

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff Felita Sample's Motion to Vacate Hearing to Declare a Vexatious Litigant. Defendants' Motion is denied as to security in the pending action. Defendants failed to provide any legal authority or competent evidence regarding Plaintiff's reasonable probability of prevailing on the merits. See Motion 9:22-28. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

Off Calendar Nov-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Andrew J. Kozlow of Ericksen Arbuthnot Attorney at Law (510-832-7770) appearing for defendants moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, AKIKO WHITE and BARBARA LEAHY's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING is DENIED. Camp and Tahoe Keys are distinguishable. September 25, 2012 does not indicate that Court was making findings other than preliminary, i.e. fully adjudicating the case on the merits. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Kay Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/KT)
